svg.title: Nemotron OCR v2 benchmark chart
svg.text: Nemotron OCR v2: GPU-active aligned utilization and power
1× NVIDIA A100-SXM4 80GB · 30,000 JPEG-byte requests · 1,000 Bo767 pages × 30 · infer_length=1024
Startup/model-load trimmed per run; lines are trailing 15s means. Legend uses measured timed images/s.
Minutes since sustained GPU activity began
Alignment gate: first ≥50% sample starting a 5s window with mean ≥50% and ≥60% active samples; raw trace tail retained.
